title: Implications: Tropical Logic & Automated Reasoning

classical.why: Boolean operations: algebraic over F_2 = EML-0

tropical_connection.AND_as_tropical_min: A ∧ B ↔ min(v(A), v(B)) in tropical semiring
tropical_connection.OR_as_tropical_max: A ∨ B ↔ max(v(A), v(B)) in tropical semiring
tropical_connection.note: Classical logic IS tropical semiring over truth values {0,1}

probabilistic.why: P(A∧B) = P(A)·P(B): EML-2; fuzzy AND = min(μ_A, μ_B): EML-0 to EML-2

belief_update.formula: log-likelihood accumulation: L += log P(e_i|H): EML-2

design.representation: Formulae as tropical polynomials over depth-valued variables
design.unification: Tropical unification: match = tropical min of depth values
design.resolution: Depth-aware resolution: only resolve if depth types compatible

depth_inference.rule: If A ⊢ B at depth d₁ and B ⊢ C at depth d₂: A ⊢ C at depth max(d₁,d₂)

theorem_prover.why: Proof search = BFS/MCTS = EML-2; depth-aware pruning = EML-0 rule

dependent_types.why: Dependent types Π(x:A).B(x): EML-3 (identity type = oscillatory path)

analysis.godel_sentence: G: G is unprovable = EML-∞ (fixed point of proof predicate)
analysis.tropical_reading: Tropical reading: G = max-depth expression in depth-∞ stratum
analysis.why: Gödel: EML-∞ but shadow=2 (arithmetic truth = real-valued) confirmed S275
analysis.tropical_logic_verdict: Tropical logic cannot prove Gödel sentence: incompleteness persists at EML-∞

verdicts.new_finding: Curry-Howard = two-level {2,3}: types(EML-2) ↔ dependent types(EML-3) = another Langlands instance

key_theorem: Tropical Logic Theorem (S310): Classical logic IS the tropical semiring over {0,1}: AND=min, OR=max, EML-0. Probabilistic/Bayesian logic: EML-2 (log-probability = EML-2). Depth-aware proof: inference depth = max(premise depths) — tropical max rule applies. NEW: CURRY-HOWARD = TWO-LEVEL {2,3}: Simple types (EML-2, domain/codomain measurement) ↔ Dependent types (EML-3, identity type = oscillatory path). This is the 10th Langlands Universality Conjecture instance. Gödel incompleteness persists in tropical logic: G = EML-∞, shadow=2. Tropical theorem prover: max-rule for depth inference = automatable.
rabbit_hole_log: Classical logic = tropical semiring over {0,1}: AND=min, OR=max
Simple types(EML-2) ↔ Dependent types(EML-3): type theory = Langlands-type
Gödel: EML-∞, shadow=2: tropical logic also incomplete
